title: SenderIdOrSelf Contact arm not future-proof for third sender type
description: SenderIdOrSelf is non_exhaustive with SelfSender and Contact(String). If spec adds a third sender category, all non-self strings already land in Contact, so a new variant would be a SemVer break regardless of non_exhaustive.
close_reason: Speculative: #[non_exhaustive] already handles future spec additions. Not actionable now.
